source_jobs.title: Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT ALEPH

Aleph is an AI-native platform for Financial Planning & Analysis (FP&A), an established software category with a multi-billion market but no clear winner. We’re trying to solve a problem many finance teams are super familiar with: data scattered across a million systems, endless spreadsheets and way too much time spent getting numbers to line up instead of actually using them to make decisions.

Aleph was founded by Albert Gozzi and Santiago Perez De Rosso, two technical founders with backgrounds from Stanford and MIT and experience working at top-tier companies such as Google, Microsoft and Bain & Company. We’re backed by top VCs (Khosla Ventures, Bain Capital Ventures, YC, Picus Capital), and work with customers like Webflow, Notion, Zapier, Y Combinator and many others.

We are hiring remotely across the Americas (United States, Canada, LATAM).




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Build and scale end-to-end production systems for a complex B2B product

 - Own features from conception through launch and iteration

 - Work directly with stakeholders to understand problems and drive solutions

 - Build shared abstractions and experiences that make complex products intuitive

 - Raise the engineering bar through excellent code, thoughtful reviews, and clear communication

The engineering problems we’re solving span everything from building thoughtful, performant UIs to complex data modeling and large-scale integrations. If you’d like to learn more about engineering here, take a look at our engineering careers https://getaleph.notion.site/engineering-careers?pvs=74 page.




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - Strong fundamentals: You can trace requests from UI to data store and make good technical decisions at every layer

 - High agency: Background as a founder, engineering lead, or startup builder. You have a builder's mindset and find creative ways to ship

 - Pragmatism: You choose the fewest and simplest tools that will actually work

 - Craft: You care deeply about code quality and translate solutions into bug-free, easily understandable code

 - Communication: Clear, direct, and persuasive across technical and non-technical audiences

 - Growth trajectory: You're operating above your level and growing fast

 - Experience: Have built complex B2B products, ideally from scratch




TECH STACK

You're familiar with our tech stack or can learn unfamiliar technologies quickly

 - Typescript, Python, React, Node.js

 - GCP

 - BigQuery, MongoDB, Postgres

 - Deployment tools: GitHub Actions + GCP

 - Observability tools: Datadog



While this is a remote-first opportunity, we're focusing on candidates within the Americas to better align with our working hours as a team.

Aleph is an equal opportunity employer that is committed to diversity and inclusion in the workplace. We prohibit discrimination and harassment of any kind based on race, color, sex, religion, sexual orientation, national origin, disability, genetic information, pregnancy, or any other protected characteristic as outlined by federal, state, or local laws.

This policy applies to all employment practices within our organization, including hiring, recruiting, promotion, termination, layoff, recall, leave of absence, compensation, benefits, training, and apprenticeship. Aleph makes hiring decisions based solely on qualifications, merit, and business needs at the time.

source_jobs.title: Engagement Manager, Private Equity
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT ALEPH

Aleph is an AI-native platform for Financial Planning & Analysis (FP&A), an established software category with a multi-billion market but no clear winner. We’re trying to solve a problem many finance teams are super familiar with: data scattered across a million systems, endless spreadsheets and way too much time spent getting numbers to line up instead of actually using them to make decisions.

Aleph was founded by Albert Gozzi and Santiago Perez De Rosso, two technical founders with backgrounds from Stanford and MIT and experience working at top-tier companies such as Google, Microsoft and Bain & Company. We’re backed by top VCs (Khosla Ventures, Bain Capital Ventures, YC, Picus Capital), and work with customers like Webflow, Notion, Zapier, Y Combinator and many others.

We are hiring remotely across the Americas (United States, Canada, LATAM).




🔍 WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

Aleph is looking for an Engagement Manager, Private Equity to work hands-on with finance teams at PE-backed companies as they implement Aleph. You'll go deep on their financial infrastructure, onboard them onto the platform, and become their primary point of contact as they expand across core FP&A workflows, e.g. reporting, budgeting, headcount planning.

This role sits at the intersection of finance expertise and customer partnership. You'll spend meaningful time in spreadsheets and financial data -- but the job is ultimately about making customers successful, not just the technical work.





👷 WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

 - Onboard PE-backed customers and guide them through core FP&A workflows

 - Become the trusted point of contact for finance teams as they expand their Aleph implementation

 - Identify adoption gaps and drive usage across your customer portfolio

 - Surface customer feedback to product and engineering -- your input shapes the roadmap

 - Help make onboarding repeatable and reliable as we scale
   
   


📝 ABOUT YOU

 - 3+ years in FP&A, strategic finance, or private equity (PE-backed company or fund-side)

 - Strong Excel / Google Sheets modeling skills

 - Ownership mentality; you don't wait to be told what needs fixing

 - Clear communicator who builds trust quickly with finance stakeholders

 - Comfortable managing multiple customers and priorities in parallel

 - Comfortable on a remote team

 - Early-stage startup experience a plus




🌞 ADDITIONAL INFORMATION, PERKS + BENEFITS

Learn more here! https://getaleph.notion.site



While this is a remote-first opportunity, we're focusing on candidates within the Americas to better align with our working hours as a team.

Aleph is an equal opportunity employer that is committed to diversity and inclusion in the workplace. We prohibit discrimination and harassment of any kind based on race, color, sex, religion, sexual orientation, national origin, disability, genetic information, pregnancy, or any other protected characteristic as outlined by federal, state, or local laws.

This policy applies to all employment practices within our organization, including hiring, recruiting, promotion, termination, layoff, recall, leave of absence, compensation, benefits, training, and apprenticeship. Aleph makes hiring decisions based solely on qualifications, merit, and business needs at the time.

source_jobs.title: Engagement Associate
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT ALEPH

Aleph is an AI-native platform for Financial Planning & Analysis (FP&A), an established software category with a multi-billion market but no clear winner. We’re trying to solve a problem many finance teams are super familiar with: data scattered across a million systems, endless spreadsheets and way too much time spent getting numbers to line up instead of actually using them to make decisions.

Aleph was founded by Albert Gozzi and Santiago Perez De Rosso, two technical founders with backgrounds from Stanford and MIT and experience working at top-tier companies such as Google, Microsoft and Bain & Company. We’re backed by top VCs (Khosla Ventures, Bain Capital Ventures, YC, Picus Capital), and work with customers like Webflow, Notion, Zapier, Y Combinator and many others.

We are hiring remotely across the Americas (United States, Canada, LATAM).




🔍 WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

Aleph is searching for a highly motivated individual to become the trusted partner of our customers as they upgrade their FP&A infrastructure with Aleph. This unique role combines customer success responsibilities with data analytics expertise, offering an exciting opportunity to apply your financial skills in a client-facing, impact-driven environment. You will dive deep into their financial infrastructure to onboard them onto Aleph and become their main point of contact as they expand their Aleph implementation across use cases (i.e. reporting, budgeting, headcount planning).

We are a small, high-impact team, so you will play an important role in scaling our customer success strategy and keep it aligned with our overall vision and goals. Also, you will collaborate with our product and engineering teams to incorporate customer feedback into the product roadmap.




👷 WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

 - Determine and establish effective ways to enhance our customers’ FP&A setup with Aleph

 - Develop lasting, trust-based partnerships with our customers.

 - Monitor key usage metrics, identify growth opportunities, and expand Aleph’s impact.

 - Shape the future of the product - bring the voice of the customer to our product and engineering teams and strategically advise on the future of the product



📝 WHAT YOU BRING

 - 2-3 years of FP&A/Consulting/Technical Implementation experience

 - Excel/Google Sheets modeling expertise

 - You have an ownership mentality and are excited to take on responsibility

 - You thrive in a fast-paced and dynamic environment

 - You are passionate about working closely with customers

 - You are comfortable working in a remote team

 - 1 year of experience at an early stage tech startup preferred




🌞 ADDITIONAL INFORMATION, PERKS + BENEFITS

Learn more here! https://getaleph.notion.site



While this is a remote-first opportunity, we're focusing on candidates within the Americas to better align with our working hours as a team.

Aleph is an equal opportunity employer that is committed to diversity and inclusion in the workplace. We prohibit discrimination and harassment of any kind based on race, color, sex, religion, sexual orientation, national origin, disability, genetic information, pregnancy, or any other protected characteristic as outlined by federal, state, or local laws.

This policy applies to all employment practices within our organization, including hiring, recruiting, promotion, termination, layoff, recall, leave of absence, compensation, benefits, training, and apprenticeship. Aleph makes hiring decisions based solely on qualifications, merit, and business needs at the time.

source_jobs.title: Account Executive, SMB
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT ALEPH

Aleph is an AI-native platform for Financial Planning & Analysis (FP&A), an established software category with a multi-billion market but no clear winner. We’re trying to solve a problem many finance teams are super familiar with: data scattered across a million systems, endless spreadsheets and way too much time spent getting numbers to line up instead of actually using them to make decisions.

Aleph was founded by Albert Gozzi and Santiago Perez De Rosso, two technical founders with backgrounds from Stanford and MIT and experience working at top-tier companies such as Google, Microsoft and Bain & Company. We’re backed by top VCs (Khosla Ventures, Bain Capital Ventures, YC, Picus Capital), and work with customers like Webflow, Notion, Zapier, Y Combinator and many others.

We are hiring remotely across the Americas (United States, Canada, LATAM).




🔍 WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR 

We're looking for an SMB Account Executive to join our growing GTM motion at Aleph. You'll own a high-velocity book of business, working with lean finance teams at early-stage companies who need to move fast. Your commission will be uncapped, and you'll be held to a very attainable quota.

You'll own the funnel end-to-end and work closely with our CEO and sales leadership to continuously refine our SMB playbook.





👷 WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

 - Qualify inbound and outbound opportunities to make sure we're engaging with the right prospects

 - Understand each prospect's financial setup to identify exactly how Aleph will benefit them

 - Deliver personalized demos tailored to lean, 1-2 person finance teams

 - Manage the full sales cycle and involve the right internal resources at the right time to close deals

 - Negotiate and close deals quickly — SMB deals move fast and so should you

 - Collaborate with our Product and Engineering teams to keep making Aleph better every day




📝 ABOUT YOU

 - You have at least 1 year of B2B SaaS closing experience or a proven track record of quickly rising through the ranks in your sales career

 - You've been an AE and exceeded quota selling deals in the $20k-$60k ACV range

 - You're comfortable selling to founders, Heads of Finance, and CFOs at early-stage companies

 - You're process driven, organized, and thrive in a fast-paced, high-volume environment

 - You're intellectually curious, interested in business, and like to solve problems

 - Bonus: you have experience selling to finance personas or working in a finance-adjacent role




🌞 ADDITIONAL INFORMATION, PERKS + BENEFITS

Learn more here! https://getaleph.notion.site



While this is a remote-first opportunity, we're focusing on candidates within the Americas to better align with our working hours as a team.

Aleph is an equal opportunity employer that is committed to diversity and inclusion in the workplace. We prohibit discrimination and harassment of any kind based on race, color, sex, religion, sexual orientation, national origin, disability, genetic information, pregnancy, or any other protected characteristic as outlined by federal, state, or local laws.

This policy applies to all employment practices within our organization, including hiring, recruiting, promotion, termination, layoff, recall, leave of absence, compensation, benefits, training, and apprenticeship. Aleph makes hiring decisions based solely on qualifications, merit, and business needs at the time.

source_jobs.title: Account Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT ALEPH

Aleph is an AI-native platform for Financial Planning & Analysis (FP&A), an established software category with a multi-billion market but no clear winner. We’re trying to solve a problem many finance teams are super familiar with: data scattered across a million systems, endless spreadsheets and way too much time spent getting numbers to line up instead of actually using them to make decisions.

Aleph was founded by Albert Gozzi and Santiago Perez De Rosso, two technical founders with backgrounds from Stanford and MIT and experience working at top-tier companies such as Google, Microsoft and Bain & Company. We’re backed by top VCs (Khosla Ventures, Bain Capital Ventures, YC, Picus Capital), and work with customers like Webflow, Notion, Zapier, Y Combinator and many others.

We are hiring remotely across the Americas (United States, Canada, LATAM).

🔍 What we're looking for

This is Aleph's first Account Manager hire. You'll own the revenue side of our customer relationships -renewals, expansions, upsells- working directly with finance teams who hold vendors to a high standard and can tell the difference between a good pitch and genuine expertise.

You're not walking into a blank slate. We have better-than-benchmark churn and NDR, a CS team that runs deep implementations, and customers who are genuinely happy with the product. What we're missing is someone to formalize the expansion motion, build it into a repeatable playbook, and own it going forward.

That means showing up credibly on two fronts: you can hold a commercial conversation with a CFO, and you can sit in a product implementation review and actually follow along.


This is a remote role open to candidates based anywhere in the US or Canada.



🧑‍💼 What you'll be doing

 - Own the end-to-end renewal process for a portfolio of accounts

 - Formalize our expansion playbook and scale it -- identify where growth potential lives, design the motion, execute it yourself

 - Partner with CSMs on account strategy; you bring the commercial angle, they bring the implementation depth

 - Engage directly with finance teams and economic buyers -- understand their workflows, speak their language, and connect Aleph's value to outcomes they actually care about

 - Run pricing conversations and negotiate renewals and expansions with confidence

 - Develop enough product fluency to discuss implementation details credibly and handle technical questions without flinching

 - Track account health signals: usage trends, AI adoption, seat utilization, QBR context

 - Flag at-risk accounts early and work with CSMs and leadership on save strategies



📋 What you bring

 - Strong analytical foundations -- finance, consulting, engineering, product etc.; whatever the path, you can work with complex data, build a tight argument, and earn trust with quantitative buyers

 - You've carried a quota, hit it, and know how to close

 - You're high slope -- you pick things up fast, take on more than your role requires, and have a track record of outgrowing wherever you've been

 - You can hold your own in a CFO or FP&A conversation as someone who genuinely understands how finance teams think, not as a vendor running through a deck


Any of the following would be a plus:

 - High-rigor background (consulting, IB, PE) with a deliberate move into go-to-market

 - Experience in a customer-facing B2B SaaS role

 - Time spent directly on a finance team at a software company

 - FP&A experience specifically -- you know what Aleph's customers do every day because you've done it



While this is a remote-first opportunity, we're focusing on candidates within the Americas to better align with our working hours as a team.

Aleph is an equal opportunity employer that is committed to diversity and inclusion in the workplace. We prohibit discrimination and harassment of any kind based on race, color, sex, religion, sexual orientation, national origin, disability, genetic information, pregnancy, or any oth
